title: Support hours
text: Customer support is available daily from 9 AM to 7 PM (WAT). Online chat is available 24/7.

title: Pickup policy
text: Same-day pickup is available for confirmed bookings made before 2 PM. Next-day pickup is guaranteed for all other bookings. Riders deliver within Lagos and Abuja metro areas only.

title: Trade-in warranty
text: All trade-in devices come with a 30-day quality guarantee. If the device condition is misgraded, customers can request a free re-evaluation within 14 days of trade-in.

title: Payment methods
text: We accept bank transfers, debit cards, USSD, and cash on pickup. Mobile money (OPay, PalmPay) is accepted for amounts under NGN 500,000. International cards are supported for online orders.
